title: MLiker's RP
description: This resourse pack related to my FNAF maps, and adds some things (like paintings, trapdoor retexture and etc.) if you find my things cool - use it as you like
body:
**_This resourse pack related to my FNAF maps, and adds some things (like paintings, trapdoor retexture and etc.) if you find my things cool - use it as you like ^^_**
List of things that you will see here:
- Retexture of vanilla paintings to FNAF related theme
- Acacia trapdoor now looks like vent 
- Maybe something more in the future
